---
title: "felixruntime"
pagetitle: "felixruntime"
page-layout: full
title-block-style: none
listing:
  - id: recent-posts
    contents: "posts/*/index.qmd"
    type: default
    sort: "date desc"
    max-items: 3
    categories: false
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    fields: [date, title, description]
---

::: {.hero}
::: {.hero-brand}
felixruntime
:::

::: {.hero-role}
Dados · Inteligência Artificial · Python · Machine Learning
:::

::: {.hero-lead}
Ex-cadete da 42 São Paulo com base em C e Linux. Cursando Tecnólogo em IA na FIAP.
:::

::: {.hero-cta}
<a href="https://github.com/felixruntime" class="hero-social" aria-label="GitHub" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"><i class="bi bi-github"></i></a>
<a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/felixruntime/" class="hero-social" aria-label="LinkedIn" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"><i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i></a>
:::
:::

::: {.home-section}
## Em destaque

::: {.featured-list}

::: {.featured-item}
::: {.featured-head}
[Sinapse API](projects/sinapse-api/index.qmd){.project-name}
[Python · Flask · AWS]{.project-stack}
:::

API REST com Flask deployada em AWS EC2, com health check e tratamento de erros.
:::

::: {.featured-item}
::: {.featured-head}
[Pi Council](projects/pi-council/index.qmd){.project-name}
[Python · Ollama · Edge AI]{.project-stack}
:::

Sistema multiagente local no Raspberry Pi 5 com modelos Llama, Qwen e Phi.
:::

::: {.featured-item}
::: {.featured-head}
[Iris KNN Optimization](projects/iris-knn-optimization/index.qmd){.project-name}
[R · Quarto · EDA]{.project-stack}
:::

EDA do dataset Iris e preparação do classificador K-NN com relatório em Quarto.
:::

:::

[Ver todos os projetos →](projects/index.qmd)
:::

::: {.home-section}
## Do blog

::: {#recent-posts}
:::

[Ver todos os posts →](posts/index.qmd)
:::
